headlines.title: John Bolton to plead guilty in classified documents case
headlines.description: Two sources familiar with the matter say former Trump National Security Advisor John Bolton, a fierce Trump critic, will now plead guilty to one count of unlawfully retaining national security information. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: Senate begins voting on Republican bill to fund ICE as GOP is split over Trump’s $1.8B fund
headlines.description: Some Republicans want to amend the bill to prohibit the Trump administration from setting up the “anti-weaponization” fund that could pay Jan. 6 rioters.

headlines.title: CIA puts senior officials on leave over officer arrested with gold bars
headlines.description: CIA officer David Rush is scheduled to appear in court Friday after the FBI said it found $40 million in gold bars stashed at his Virginia home.

headlines.title: ‘The Odyssey’ ticket rush overwhelms AMC website and app
headlines.description: Making plans to see Christopher Nolan’s “The Odyssey” turned into a quest of its own for some fans on Thursday as a surge of would-be ticket buyers appeared to bog down AMC’s website

headlines.title: Team USA’s loudest supporters say FIFA pushed them to upper deck for World Cup
headlines.description: Despite disappointment over seat locations, many supporters remain grateful for access to relatively affordable tickets.

headlines.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
headlines.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

headlines.title: Bot web traffic has overtaken human web traffic, data shows
headlines.description: Traffic to websites from AI agents and bots has eclipsed human-generated web traffic for the first time.

headlines.title: St. Louis to host 2028 U.S. Olympic marathon trials
headlines.description: The first six athletes on Team USA for the 2028 Olympics will be determined in St.

headlines.title: Kathy Hilton exits West Hollywood Pride role after backlash from LGBTQ+ community
headlines.description: “Pride belongs to the community,” the city said.

headlines.title: Team USA’s loudest supporters say FIFA pushed them to upper deck for World Cup
headlines.description: Despite disappointment over seat locations, many supporters remain grateful for access to relatively affordable tickets.

headlines.title: Trump says Bill Pulte will serve only in an acting capacity as DNI
headlines.description: The controversial pick drew bipartisan pushback when Trump announced he would nominate him to the position permanently.

headlines.title: House committee calls on DOJ to investigate two men with ties to Jeffrey Epstein
headlines.description: The House Oversight Committee said Thursday it was asking the Justice Department to investigate sexual misconduct allegations made by Jeffrey Epstein’s former assistant, Sarah Kellen, against two of his associates
